TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_msaw_kmayal, title = msaw_kmayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/msaw_kmayal} }

S.FORM: lahi bala msyaw kmayal hya, psayqan ta ni plmukan la. 'mblaq mtzyaw ananau zywau ga, aki.
lahi bala msyaw kmayal hya, psayqan ta ni plmukan la. 'mblaq mtzyaw ananau zywau ga, aki.
S.PHON: laħi βala ms~ɕjaw kmajal ħja, ps~ɕajqan ta ni plmukan la. ʔmβlaq mtzjaw ananau zjwau ɣa, aki.
